Supercharge your NFT Adventure

Find the right NFT collections to buy within the platform.

Connect
POWERED BY AMAZING INVESTORS:

How to mint

Setup Your Account

Once you've set up your wallet of choice, connect it to Reliable NFT Marketplace NFT Collections clicking the NFT Marketplace at the top right corner.

Create Collections

Click Create and set up your collection. Add social links, a description, profile & banner images, and set a secondary sales fee.

Add Your NFTs

Upload your work (image, video, audio, or 3D art), add a title and description, and customize your NFTs with properties, stats.

Sell Your NFTs

Choose between auctions, fixed-price listings, and declining-price listings. You choose how you want to sell your NFTs!

Phase 01

Planning

Quality comes first. we took our time to plan out everything and build our production pipeline for a good quality artworks.
